name: Southwestern Egg Puff
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Velveeta Mexican Pasteurized Process Cheese Spread
1 can (12 oz) whole kernel corn with sweet peppers, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the Velveeta cheese spread, cottage cheese, eggs, picante sauce, melted margarine or butter, flour, baking powder, seasoned salt, and corn.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 12 x 8-inch baking dish.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Top with additional picante sauce, sour cream, and avocado slices if desired.
6. Serve and enjoy. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
